name: dev-squad
description: Software-development squad with five core agents plus four optional specialist reviewers (security/performance/requirement/standard). Three review modes — single, split, split-on-risk (default). Parallel-safe execution via workstreams + ownership maps, fleet mode for multi-task git-worktree isolation, 3-round brainstorm session, stack detector for per-agent skill recommendations, a compounding Karpathy-style project wiki, and cross-session resume (state survives session close; /squad-resume + SessionStart nudge).
